value.stringValue: {!$Record.Partner__r.Name} has sent a new Lead for {!$Record.FirstName} {!$Record.LastName}

assignments.description: If Lead Unqualified Date is Greater Than 30 days, assign the new Lead Attribution record created above to the existing Lead and update 'Reactive Lead' field on the existing Lead to trigger Omni-Channel on the async path.
assignments.name: Assign_Attribution_to_Existing_Lead
assignments.label: Assign Attribution to Existing Lead

assignments.name: Assign_Value_Marked_for_Deletion_Owner
assignments.label: Assign Value - Marked for Deletion & Owner

assignments.name: Assign_values_to_varAttribution_Closed_Opportunity
assignments.label: Assign values to varAttribution - Closed Opportunity

assignments.name: Assign_values_to_varAttribution_Open_Opportunity
assignments.label: Assign values to varAttribution - Open Opportunity

assignments.name: Copy_1_of_Assign_Value_Lead_to_be_deleted_by_Automation
assignments.label: Copy 1 of Assign Value - Lead to be deleted by Automation

assignments.name: Copy_2_of_Assign_Value_Lead_to_be_deleted_by_Automation
assignments.label: Copy 2 of Assign Value - Lead to be deleted by Automation

assignments.name: Set_Lead_to_Unqualified_and_Reason_Insured_with_Kingsbridge
assignments.label: Set Lead to Unqualified and Reason Insured with Kingsbridge

rules.name: Meets_Quarantine_Criteria
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR (3 AND 4) OR (3 AND 5) OR (3 AND 6) OR (3 AND 7) OR (3 AND 8) OR (8 AND 9) OR (8 AND 10))
rules.label: Meets Quarantine Criteria

rules.name: Meets_Quarantine_Criteria_Async
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR (3 AND 4) OR (3 AND 5) OR (3 AND 6) OR (3 AND 7) OR (3 AND 8) OR (8 AND 9) OR (8 AND 10))
rules.label: Meets Quarantine Criteria_Async

decisions.name: Check_If_Lead_exists_as_Customer_Account
decisions.label: Check If Lead exists as Customer Account

decisions.name: Check_if_matching_Open_Opportunity_found
decisions.label: Check if matching Open Opportunity found

decisions.name: Check_if_Same_Lead_Records_Found_Async
decisions.label: Check if Same Lead Records Found_Async

decisions.name: Check_if_there_s_any_Closed_Opportunities
decisions.label: Check if there's any Closed Opportunities

decisions.description: Check if Lead Status is Unqualified and Unqualified Date is NOT blank
decisions.name: Check_Lead_is_Unqualified
decisions.label: Check Lead is Unqualified

decisions.description: Check Reactivate Lead is True, Unqualified Date is NOT blank and Status = Unqualified
decisions.name: Check_Lead_needs_Reactivation
decisions.label: Check Lead needs Reactivation

decisions.description: Check if Referrer is Account or Lead
decisions.name: Check_Referred_By_Fields_Lead_NOT_Set_Up
decisions.label: Check Referred By Fields - Lead NOT Set Up

rules.name: Referred_by_Lead_Lead_NOT_Set_Up
rules.label: Referred by Lead - Lead NOT Set Up

rules.name: Referred_by_Account_Lead_NOT_Set_Up
rules.label: Referred by Account - Lead NOT Set Up

rules.name: Referred_by_Lead_Account_Lead_NOT_Set_Up
rules.label: Referred by Lead & Account - Lead NOT Set Up

decisions.description: Check if Unqualified Date is Greater Than 30 days.
decisions.name: Check_Unqualified_Date
decisions.label: Check Unqualified Date

decisions.description: Check if Lead Unqualified Date is Greater Than 30 days
decisions.name: Check_Unqualified_Date_Async
decisions.label: Check Unqualified Date_Async

decisions.description: Check if the Address fields on the new Lead are not blank
decisions.name: CheckAddress_is_NOT_Blank
decisions.label: Check Address is NOT Blank

decisions.description: Check if Referrer is Account or Lead
decisions.name: Checked_Referred_By_Fields_Lead_Set_Up
decisions.label: Checked Referred By Fields - Lead Set Up

rules.name: Referred_by_Lead_Lead_Set_Up
rules.label: Referred by Lead - Lead Set Up

rules.label: Referred by Account - Lead Set Up

rules.name: Referred_by_Lead_Account_Lead_Set_Up
rules.label: Referred by Lead & Account - Lead Set Up

decisions.name: Closed_Opp_has_the_same_Product_Type
decisions.label: Closed Opp has the same Product Type?

rules.name: Yes_Closed_Opp_has_the_same_Product_Type
rules.label: Yes, Closed Opp has the same Product Type

decisions.name: Current_Text_is_Existing_Product_Type
decisions.label: Current Text is Existing Product Type?

rules.name: Yes_Product_Type_Contains_Open_Opp
rules.label: Yes, Product Type Contains Open Opp

Flow.description: Record triggered flow when a Lead (Contractor) is created
Flow.label: Lead: Create

loops.name: Loop_through_all_Closed_Opps_Product_Types
loops.label: Loop through all Closed Opps Product Types

loops.name: Loop_through_all_Product_Types_for_Open_Opps

recordLookups.description: Get Referrer Lead named on the Triggering Lead record
recordLookups.name: Copy_1_of_Get_Referrer_Lead
recordLookups.label: Get Referred By Fields Lead

recordLookups.description: Get Lead records that is already set up in SF
recordLookups.name: Get_Lead_Record_for_Current_Text
recordLookups.label: Get Lead Record for Current Text
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND ((5 AND 6) OR (7 AND 8) OR 9 OR 10)

recordLookups.description: Get Referrer Account named on the Triggering Lead record

recordLookups.name: Get_Referrer_Lead

recordLookups.description: Get Lead records that is already set up in SF
recordLookups.name: Get_Same_Lead_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Same Lead Record
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND ((5 AND 6) OR (7 AND 8) OR 9 OR 10)

recordLookups.description: Get Lead records that is already set up in SF
recordLookups.name: Get_Same_Lead_Record_Async
recordLookups.label: Get Same Lead Record Async

recordUpdates.label: Update Case Owner to Account Owner

recordUpdates.description: Update Existing Lead Status & Reactive Lead to False

recordUpdates.description: Update Existing Lead record with data from new Lead
recordUpdates.name: Update_Existing_Lead_record

textTemplates.name: notificationTitle
textTemplates.text: A new Partner Lead has been created for {!$Record.Company}
